The '''Senate Support Services''', abbreviated to '''SSS''', was a organization that provided [[Technician/Legends|technical]] assistance to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. As of [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], [[Dean Jinzler]] and [[Brooks (technician)|Brooks]] worked for the Senate Support Services.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
